tasks.spec:
You are a Ringer worker implementing ONE new file in a git worktree of the ringer repo. Your current working directory IS that worktree — edit files here directly, leave ALL changes uncommitted (never run git commit; the check exports your diff as a patch), and never touch anything outside this directory. You own EXACTLY ONE file: scripts/quality_feed.py (new). Do not modify any other file.

GOAL: the quality-feedback sidecar. After a Ringer run, the orchestrator grades each worker's output 0..1 and this tool POSTs one quality sample per gradable task to the Feeder router, so persistently-poor models fade from future routing.

CONTEXT: run state JSONs (object with "tasks": [...]) may carry, per task: "status" ("pass"/"fail"/...), "model" (e.g. "feeder/auto/coding" — the wire class is the suffix after "feeder/auto/"), and an optional "feeder" dict written by an enrichment tool: {"served": [{"platform": ..., "model_id": ..., "calls": ..., "output_tokens": ...}, ...], "mixed_models": bool, "failovers": int, ...}.

IMPLEMENT scripts/quality_feed.py (Python 3.11+, STDLIB ONLY):
CLI: python3 scripts/quality_feed.py --state STATE_JSON [--grade KEY=SCORE ...] [--default-pass SCORE] [--default-fail SCORE] [--feeder-base URL] [--model-id-form combined|bare] [--dry-run | --post]
1. Load STATE_JSON. Parse repeated --grade KEY=SCORE args (SCORE a float; if any SCORE is outside 0..1 or unparsable, print the offending arg and exit 1). Defaults: --default-pass 0.8, --default-fail 0.0, --feeder-base http://localhost:3001, --model-id-form combined.
2. For each task IN ORDER build at most one sample:
   - SKIP (collect {"key": ..., "reason": ...}) when: the task has no "feeder" dict or its "served" list is empty/missing (reason must contain the words "no served model"), or feeder["mixed_models"] is true (reason must contain "mixed models" — an attempt served by 2+ models must not be attributed to one).
   - Otherwise the served model is served[0]. model_id = platform + "/" + model_id when --model-id-form is combined (e.g. "sambanova/DeepSeek-V3.1"), bare model_id when bare.
   - quality_score = the explicit --grade for this key if given, else --default-pass when status == "pass", else --default-fail. Round-trip floats untouched (0.9 stays 0.9).
   - task_class = the substring of the task's "model" field after "feeder/auto/" (omit the task_class field entirely if the model is exactly "feeder/auto" or the field is missing).
   - sample = {"model_id": ..., "task_class": ..., "quality_score": ..., "judge": "ringer"} (this exact key order is not required, but exactly these keys).
3. --dry-run: print to stdout EXACTLY ONE json document: {"samples": [...], "skipped": [...]} and exit 0. No other stdout output in dry-run mode (notes go to stderr).
4. --post: POST each sample as JSON to {feeder-base}/api/model-perf/sample (Content-Type: application/json), print one line per sample to stderr with the HTTP status, and print the same summary JSON to stdout at the end with an added per-sample "posted": true/false. Network errors on one sample must not abort the rest. Exit 0 if all posted, 3 if any failed.
5. Neither flag: behave like --dry-run.

HOW TO VERIFY (this exact command is the task's check — run it yourself from the worktree root until it passes): sh /home/ajo/ringer/scripts/checks/phase5_quality_feed_check.sh
The check runs a 4-task fixture (graded pass 0.9 / mixed-models / no-feeder-block fail / ungraded pass) and asserts the exact two samples, the two skips with reasons, and that an out-of-range grade exits nonzero.

HARD RULES: stdlib only; no git commit; no network calls in dry-run mode; only scripts/quality_feed.py may be created or changed; write nothing outside the worktree.
tasks.check: mkdir -p /tmp/ringer-phase5-quality/patches && git add -A && git diff --cached > /tmp/ringer-phase5-quality/patches/quality-feed.patch && sh /home/ajo/ringer/scripts/checks/phase5_quality_feed_check.sh
tasks.verified: the sidecar was executed against a fixture and produced exactly the agreed samples (graded + default), skipped mixed-model and unserved attempts with reasons, and rejected an out-of-range grade
